WinCLIP (This Project): Window-based CLIP with compositional prompt ensemble
AnomalyCLIP: Object-agnostic text prompt learning with CLIP backbone
AdaptCLIP: Hybrid static + dynamic learnable prompts with alternating visual/textual optimization
AnomalyGPT: LLM integrated with a Vision-Language Model (VLM)
FiLo: LLM + Grounding DINO for fine-grained visual grounding

WinCLIP (This Project): Sliding window analysis excels at finding fine structural anomalies and missing components
AnomalyCLIP: Learns generalizable object-agnostic prompts — excels on texture-heavy categories
AdaptCLIP: Adapts dynamically to each test image without training data
AnomalyGPT: No manual threshold tuning; supports multi-turn textual reasoning
FiLo: Targets micro-defects by grounding text descriptions to precise image regions

WinCLIP (This Project): Lower global classification AUROC compared to newer methods; slower on CPU
AnomalyCLIP: Less specialized for fine structural / logical anomalies
AdaptCLIP: Computationally heavier at inference due to dynamic adaptation
AnomalyGPT: High computational cost; latency unsuitable for real-time lines
FiLo: Requires multiple heavy models increasing deployment complexity

WinCLIP (This Project): Structural defects and small missing components on rigid objects
AnomalyCLIP: Texture-based defect detection across wide range of objects
AdaptCLIP: High-variability appearance settings without training data
FiLo: Micro-defect detection requiring exact text-to-region grounding

WinCLIP (This Project): 15 categories / 30 imgs per subfolder / T4 GPU
